Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorney'S Fees After Trial
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John H. Dresslar, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Motion for Award of Attorney's Fees is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. Order signed in open court. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288. (514)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

David Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for the Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., DBA Great Western Collection Bureau.
Witness Andrew Weiss, Sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Green Valley, Inc.,
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages $8915.59
Prejudgment Interest $4,600.10
Costs $725.00 for a Total of $14,240.69
Judgment was signed.
